item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p06","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The assistant immediately brakes the requested next confirmation person as a long-term/default fix, names the repeated pattern of using manual guarding to patch process holes, and moves upstream to process control with scan/registration, exception prompts, and responsibility assignment. It does allow a temporary same-day containment check, but frames it as emergency handling rather than the structural answer, so it does not exhibit the fail signal of simply adding another manual gate."}
